_doc: Pipeline dependencies per kit, keyed by plugin name (must match the plugin names in ../../.claude-plugin/marketplace.json). The add-kits skill reads the kit list from marketplace.json and looks up each kit's swappable pipeline here. TO ADD A FUTURE KIT: publish it in marketplace.json as usual — it then appears in the offer automatically. If it needs a pipeline, add one entry here keyed by its plugin name; if it is self-contained (like the accountability kit), add nothing and it simply gets no pipeline offer. Each pipeline tool needs: plugin (its plugin name), source (owner/repo passed to `claude plugin marketplace add`), marketplace (the marketplace's declared name, used in `claude plugin install <plugin>@<marketplace>`). source and marketplace differ on purpose — the add-source is a repo slug, the install-target is the marketplace's own name. Add "optional": true to a tool that is an augment running alongside the core rather than filling a gate — the skill offers those as a separate, pick-any list (default none); tools without the flag are the core pipeline, offered install-all-or-skip.
